message:
test(cli): Add comprehensive tests for init command

Improve test coverage for init command:
- Global init structure creation and idempotency
- Force reinit with backups
- JSON output modes
- Repo-level init in git repos
- Error handling for non-git directories
- Nested subdirectory handling
- Starter application and validation
- Force without confirmation errors
- Human-readable output modes
- CASS_PATH environment variable handling

Coverage improved from 67% to 72%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
